title: Rest timer pause button
feedback: Multiple users flagged that mid-rest interruptions had no recovery path — the timer would reset instead of holding position.

title: Smoother rest timer audio — gentle start, explosive final 10 seconds
feedback: The start beep was reported as jarring and disruptive at the beginning of a rest period.

title: Feedback routes directly to the team via GitHub Issues
feedback: Previous feedback mechanism had no notification path — submissions were disappearing into a void.

title: You Asked, We Built community board
feedback: Users had no visibility into whether their feedback was read or acted on.
